metadata.title: Hash Pasted Image
metadata.description: Auto rename pasted images added to the vault via hash algorithm SHA-512

regex.target: 通知(`粘贴图像已重命名为 ${newName}`)

regex.source: text: "Auto rename pasted images added to the vault via hash algorithm SHA-512"
regex.target: text: "通过SHA-512哈希算法自动重命名添加到库中的粘贴图像"

regex.source: .setDesc("Algorithm to hash the pasted image name.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于哈希粘贴图像名称的算法.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show a notification when a pasted image is renamed.")
regex.target: .setDesc("粘贴图像重命名时显示通知.")
